docs.title: Promoting research through blog posts and open-source code
docs.text: DeepGroundwater was inspired from the idea that not all research belongs on academic journals. There is great work done by students, postdocs, and research leads that may not advance the science, but deserves to be shared with the community. Furthermore, the peer-review process often can take weeks, if not months, for a paper to make it from draft to published. There is a need for a site to share developing reserach, and code, with others to spurn discovery and novelty; and we at Deep Groundwater hope we can provide that here.

docs.title: Welcome to DeepGroundwater
docs.text:
We hope that you can use this site to share open-source academic research

docs.title: Roadmap
docs.text: DeepGroundwater is looking to expand out of Beta development, and into a weekly-updated blog with articles from both the board members, and scientific community.

docs.title: Features
docs.text:
Below are ideas we are pursuing at DeepGroundwater to make the user, and research sharing, experience better:

  • Zenodo API Tools
  • arXiv API Tools
  • s3 API Tools
  • Dockerization tutorials for complex apps
  • Data Catalogs for dataset management

If you're interested in tackling these ideas, feel free to open an issue in our GitHub page.
